_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish and collect metrics to monitor and validate cyber workforce readiness including analysis of cyber workforce data to assess the status of positions identified, filled, and filled with qualified personnel.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-006 (OP, cosine: 0.439), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.321). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, assess, collect, cyber, establish, filled] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.870, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 30-word DCWF element and 27-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (64.9%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Establish and collect metrics to monitor and validate cyber workforce readiness" and "Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data a". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.488 > STS 0.321 (gap +0.168). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.8%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [analysis, assess, collect, cyber, establish, filled]. WIDAI-only: [ability, adopt, adoption, ai, assessing, community].
